creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #1)
> This patch is not against the opennurbs in SVN head. Please regenerate the
> patch, and attach it to the PR.

Are you sure?

I submitted a new patch, but save by the fact that the path of my svn checkout is different, the patch is the same.

The first one was generated using

diff -ruN /usr/ports/graphics/opennurbs graphics/opennurbs

with /usr/ports being a fresh copy retrieved with portsnap.

and the second one
diff -ruN ~/porting/ports/head/graphics/opennurbs/ graphics/opennurbs/

with a fresh copy checked out with svn.

What am I doing wrong?

Thanks in advance.
